objectives.splits: Choose your 3/2 split. Your opponent picks simultaneously.
objectives.placing: Place your stones strategically on your starting edge.
objectives.free_move: Player 2: make your free opening move.
objectives.play_normal: Move toward the center. Maintain partnerships. Outplay your opponent.
objectives.play_holding: You hold the center. Use your 3 moves wisely.
objectives.play_berserker: Opponent holds center. Partnership suspended. Max 1 displacement.
objectives.wait_normal: Opponent's turn. Plan your next moves.
objectives.wait_holding: You hold the center — opponent is trying to dislodge you.
objectives.wait_berserker: Opponent has a restoration turn. Brace yourself.
objectives.opponent_left: Your opponent has left the game.
